plan_metadata.name: Teams Agent With Data Customize OpenAI py Copilot Remote Debug

steps.description: Click on the "Teams Agents and Apps" option within the "New Project" dropdown menu.
Type 'Teams Agent with Data' in the dropdown field labeled "Select an option" within the "Teams Agent or App Using Microsoft Teams SDK" interface in Visual Studio Code.
Press the "Enter" key to select the option "Teams Agent with Data" from the dropdown in the Visual Studio Code interface within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit.
Type 'Customize' into the dropdown field labeled "Select an option to load your data," located in the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit interface.
Press the "Enter" key to confirm selection of the "Customize" option from the dropdown in the "Select an option to load your data" field within the Microsoft 365 Agents Toolkit in Visual Studio Code.

Press the "Enter" key to select the "Default folder" option under the "Choose the folder where your project root folder will be located" dropdown in Visual Studio Code's Workspace Folder setup interface.
